internal_issues.description: SPE vs geomagnetic-storm category conflation in WIN-061 detail_evidence paragraphs 1 and 2. S&F 1999 (solar proton events at Arrival Heights) was presented as primary evidence against G3 CME-driven storm suppression. EXP-232 promoted Pazos et al. 2019 (genuine G-class storm study) to lead citation and explicitly qualified S&F as SPE evidence with mechanistic parenthetical.
internal_issues.fix_notes: 2 patches applied. 3449 tests pass. ISS-1451 closed.

internal_issues.description: EXP-211-redesign dropped sentence 'The headline number is manually entered with a self-serving denominator.' Curmudgeon rated the loss major. Operator HNOTE directed re-insertion: 'design cannot eat truth' — the sentence is the sharpest single critique of the headline-count methodology.
internal_issues.fix_notes: Sentence re-inserted into EXP-211-redesign.json (change_3 aside, ama-col-source paragraph 1, before Section 6.6 link). Load-bearing words 'self-serving' and 'manually entered' preserved verbatim. ISS-1437 closed. Curmudgeon queue item (qid 240) pushed for verification that sentence survived round-trip.
